name: warp-ttd
description: Cross-host Time Travel Debugger for WARP systems

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test test/echoFixtureAdapter.spec.ts test/adapterRegistry.spec.ts test/protocolContract.spec.ts test/protocolPublicationBoundary.spec.ts test/wesleyGeneratedProtocol.spec.ts test/generatedFamilyIngress.spec.ts test/mcpAdmissionChainSurface.spec.ts test/connectPage.spec.ts test/cliJson.spec.ts test/effectEmission.spec.ts test/scenarioFixture.spec.ts test/debuggerSession.spec.ts test/liveEchoAdapterProbe.spec.ts test/liveEchoFamilyIntake.spec.ts test/liveTargetInspection.spec.ts test/runtimeHelloInspection.spec.ts test/runtimeRegistry.spec.ts test/inspectorPage.spec.ts test/navigatorLayout.spec.ts test/laneGraphRenderer.spec.ts test/neighborhoodCoreSummary.spec.ts test/neighborhoodFocusSummary.spec.ts test/neighborhoodSiteCatalog.spec.ts test/receiptShellSummary.spec.ts test/reintegrationDetailSummary.spec.ts test/sessionSync.spec.ts test/worldlineLayout.spec.ts test/worldlinePage.spec.ts test/worldlineRender.spec.ts test/worldlineSplitView.spec.ts test/cliWorldline.spec.ts test/tuiPageStructure.spec.ts test/neighborhoodAssembler.spec.ts
scripts.docs:verify: npm run docs:check && npm run docs:evidence && npm run docs:impact && npm run docs:eval
scripts.docs:verify:all: npm run docs:check:all && npm run docs:evidence:all && npm run docs:impact:all
